framework.name: Coordinated Multi-Agent Budget-Constrained Booking
framework.description: Example of agent coordinating across multiple merchants (airline, hotel) with total budget constraint. Agent interacts with multiple other agents and booking platforms, finds combination within $700 budget, executes both bookings simultaneously with cryptographic signatures. Demonstrates cross-platform authorization with spending limits.
framework.raw_quote: A user tells their agent: 'Book me a round-trip flight and a hotel in Palm Springs for the first weekend of November, with a total budget of USD $700.' The agent can then interact with both airline and hotel agents... and once it finds a combination that fits the budget, it can execute both cryptographically-signed bookings simultaneously.
